title: Fairness in AI-Driven Recruitment: Challenges, Metrics, Methods, and Future Directions
description:
Traditional hiring practices, such as job
advertisements, skill assessments, and personality tests[1], have been
extensively studied by human resource (HR) experts and industrial-organizational
(I-O) psychologists.
Specifically, 41% used AI-based chatbots for candidate engagement, 44% used AI
for candidate identification from social media and other public data, and 43%
used AI for recommending training to candidates[11].
